name: Jayanthbharadwaj M
description: Technical Lead with 7+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, microservices, and multi-tenant platforms using Node.js and cloud technologies.

tasks: Architected multi-tenant microservices platforms with automated tenant provisioning (DB, schema, domain).
Built scalable backend systems using Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka for real-time processing.
Developed REST APIs and event-driven systems for device management and data ingestion.
Led migration of legacy systems to microservices using JSON-driven APIs.
Implemented authentication using AWS Cognito and Azure AD with MFA and passkeys.
Optimized performance using Redis caching and database query tuning.
Led frontend development for real-time dashboard using React.js and WebSockets.
Built REST APIs and JSON-driven UI components for scalable dashboards.
Implemented authentication using AWS Cognito with multi-tenant support.
Developed migration service for AWS resource provisioning and data transfer.
Developed backend REST APIs for EdTech platform (user and payment workflows).
Built notification services using SMTP and SMS APIs.
Optimized API performance and database queries.
Developed web applications using PHP, Node.js, and React.
Built and published React Native apps on Play Store and App Store.
Improved performance and resolved security issues.
Supported web application development and database-related tasks under senior engineer guidance.
